calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn & Mtn For Appointment Of A Receiver & To Appoint Richard B Cole As Receiver
Off Calendar Feb-29-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association's motion for appointment of a receiver is granted. No opposition has been filed. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions;
Off Calendar Sep-20-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association's motion to compel responses to post judgment interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections within 21 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $340 shall be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-21-2007 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-16-2007 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jun-13-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
